events.description: segment opens, shield icon and title text fade in with upward slide
subtitle 'Before installing any extension' slides up
Check 1 card slides in — publisher verification, number badge pops with spring
publisher name row with 'MS' avatar appears inside Check 1
blue checkmark seal pops in with spring scale — key verification moment
Check 2 card slides in — source code check, Check 1 dims and gets completed checkmark
GitHub repo link row appears in green — good state
red flag warning pops in with spring and pulsing glow — 'No repository' danger indicator
Check 3 card slides in — permissions audit, Check 2 dims and completes
package.json manifest code block with file icon appears
Color Theme Extension permission row fades in
Terminal Access danger row pops in with red glow — suspicious permission highlighted
large warning banner scales in — 'Something is very wrong' with pulsing red glow, dramatic reveal
